result: Data cleaning completed successfully. The cleaned dataset has been saved to data/output/cleaned_data.csv with 16,111 rows and 2 columns (NSID, lang). The language variable has been harmonized across all 4 waves with standardized missing value codes: -8 (Don't know: 1), -3 (Not asked: 194), 1 (English only: 12,453), 2 (English first/main + other languages: 1,873), 3 (Another language first/main: 1,122), 4 (Bilingual: 468).
